response.overview: Taban, a 25-year-old actress, auditions for a lead role in a major film. During the final screen test, she's required to act out an intense emotional scene. The casting director pushes her by probing her personal relationship with her father to evoke the necessary reactions. While successful in securing the role, Taban struggles with the psychological impact of the audition process. This film explores the troubling intersection between artistic vulnerability and ethical boundaries.
response.title: A Sight of Her
